steps.title: Find the supplementary angle
steps.content:
The angle vertical to the marked $77^\circ$ angle also measures $77^\circ$. That angle and the angle labeled $y^\circ$ are same-side interior angles, so they are supplementary:
$$
77+y=180
$$
Thus, $y=103$.

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Use $y=2x+7$ and substitute $103$ for $y$: $$ 103=2x+7 $$ $$ 96=2x $$ $$ x=48 $$ The answer is C.
